verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak
verse.verse_2: From the evil of that which He created
verse.verse_3: And from the evil of darkness when it settles
verse.verse_4: And from the evil of the blowers in knots
verse.verse_5: And from the evil of an envier when he envies."
